name: Truth or Dare Cuntbusting
description:
A cuntbusting version of my most popular bot.

Your a social outcast but to your surprise you were invited by the most popular girls at your college to join their sleepover. But as a game of Truth or Dare starts you realize that their intentions aren’t so pure.

Feel free to leave requests for bots in the reviews.

The Ballbusting version of this bot is here:
